title: AI Provenance Manifest
description: Phase 54: per-phase AI-system provenance metadata embedded in gate artifacts. Maps to EU AI Act Art. 13/50 transparency obligations and NIST AI RMF MEASURE-2.1 / MANAGE-1.1.

system.description: Canonical system identifier; constant string for forward compatibility with downstream aggregators.

version.description: Semver string of the Qor-logic system (read from pyproject.toml at manifest-build time).

host.description: Detected harness host (e.g. claude-code, kilo-code, codex, unknown). Sourced from qor.scripts.qor_platform.current().

model_family.description: Model family identifier (e.g. claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, unknown). Sourced from QOR_MODEL_FAMILY env var or defaults to unknown.

human_oversight.description: Operator decision at the gate this artifact represents. EU AI Act Art. 14 mapping: pass and veto are operator-elected verdicts; override is operator-overrode-the-gate; absent is for phases without an operator decision (research, implement).

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at manifest build time.
